lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: You, you're the human that killed Tyras. Arianwyn told us about you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's me. Could you take me to Arianwyn?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Why should we? All you human do is take and destroy with no care for others. We don't need your help. You've done enough damage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I admit that I've made a few mistakes, but my intentions were good, I swear.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Maybe, but it's not a risk worth taking. It was the acts of humans that led my grantmother's death. You will bring similar ruin to us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your grandmother?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Glarial, wife to King Baxtorian. At one time my grandparents ruled over a great elven kingdom. But your kind put an end to that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Glarial? I know that name, I visited her tomb. I moved her remians to Baxtorian Falls, I thought that was where she would want to be.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: You... you moved her into the waterfall? That... that's the perfect place for her to be.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Maybe this human isn't as bad as you think Islwyn

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Maybe... Very well human, we will take you to Arianwyn. But first, there is something you must do. If my grandmother has been moved, then her new tomb must be consecrated. Do this, and you will earn my trust.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Deal, what do I need to do?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: I don't know the consecration process myself. You should speak to Eluned. She is wise in the ways of the ritual.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather not.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: If you wish to see Arianwyn, this is the only way. Come find us if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do you need to do?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: I don't know the consecration process myself. You should speak to Eluned. She is wise in the ways of the ritual.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, Islwyn said you might be able to help me. He told me you'd know how to consecrate ground for an elven burrial. I need to consecrate Glarial's new resting place.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: That I do... It is also elvish tradition to plant a specially enchanted crystal seed at the graves of our ancestors. The seed will create guardians to protect the area. Unfortunately the crystal seed must be tuned to the person it's protecting... a new seed won't do. But you should be able to recover the seed from her old tomb. I'm not very familiar with the lands to the east so I couldn't tell you where her old tomb is I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's okay, I've been there before. It's just south east of Baxtorian Falls.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Excellent. Now, the tomb's guardians will be protecting the seed, you'll need to defeat one of them to get it. Once you have it, return to me and I will re-enchant it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll be back as soon as I have it.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Hello, any luck finding the consecration seed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No not yet.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: You should be able to find it in her old resting place, I think you said it was south east of Baxtorian Falls. You'll need to defeat one of the old tomb's guardians to obtain it. Bring it to me as soon as you find it, then I can re-enchant it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Good day. Have you spoken to Eluned yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, she told me to retrieve a crystal seed from Glarial's old tomb.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well I wish I could help but my kind have no place in the east any more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Good day. Have you spoken to Eluned yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, she told me to retrieve a crystal seed from Glarial's old tomb. I have it right here.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Good, you should go and show it to her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, will do.

sections.title: Speaking to Eluned after losing the crystal seed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I lost the crystal seed.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Not to worry, now I know the harmonic of Glarial's crystal, I can reproduce another one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Hey, How's it going? Have you managed to reconsecrate Glarial's resting place?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Well when you're ready, plant the seed in Glarial's new tomb, close to her remains. With it in place, she will rest in peace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Good day. I hear you managed to retrieve the crystal seed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Indeed I did, all I need to do now is plant it in her new resting place.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: This is good to hear. It put me at ease to know she is in my grandfather's home. I will rest even easier once it has been consecrated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Hello, any luck finding the consecration seed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have it here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How odd. I can see her lips moving... But there's no sound.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Plant this seed in Glarial's new tomb, close to her remains. With it in place, she will rest in peace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, will do.

sections.title: Attempting to plant the seed at incorrect location
Planting the seed at the Waterfall dungeon Chalice

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Hey, How's it going? Have you managed to reconsecrate Glarial's resting place?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it's done.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Well done. You should let Islwyn know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Islwyn..

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: You have returned! Is it done?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is, your grandmother's resting place has been consecrated.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Thank you, I admit I was wrong about you. You have showed care and compassion that I didn't think possible for a human. As promised, we will take you to Arianwyn. But first, a reward for you.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: We elves use equipment formed out of crystal itself, far superior to your human weapons. However, the crystal does degrade with use and will eventually revert to seed. Both the shield and bow I am carrying have been used, so are not at their full potential. They should still be quite useful though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fascinating. What do you mean by 'revert to seed'?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: All elven crystal starts as a seed. It can then be sung into various shapes through the power of the voice. Eventually, it reverts back to seed, ready for the next song. Keep an eye out for an elf named Ilfeen as you wander the forest. She can chant crystal seeds into new items for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will, thanks.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Anyway, I'm sure you will learn more about crystal seeds as you spend time with our kind. For now though, which one of these creations would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shields are for wimps! Give me the bow!

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: All right. If you ever need a replacement I can sell you another. Remember, the better the condition of crystal equipment, the more potential it has.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't like running and hiding behind mushrooms. Shield please!

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: All right. If you ever need a replacement I can sell you another. Remember, the better the condition of crystal equipment, the more potential it has.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need some time to decide.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Very well. Come find me when you are ready.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Now, let us know when you are ready to be taken to Arianwyn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Hi, I hear you finished consecrating Glarial's tomb. Well done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was a worthy deed.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Indeed it was. Anyway, are you ready to be taken to Arianwyn?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Hello there. Are you ready to be taken to Arianwyn?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm ready.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Sorry friend, but I don't actually think you are.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Very well. Arianwyn will be in Lletya, Eluned can take you there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I wanted to talk about crystal equipment.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a bow.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you'll have to get 900,000 coins. Oh well... See you later.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you don't have space to hold it.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: They're 900,000 coins each for new ones.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Good hunting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your prices are outrageously expensive! Do I look like a banker to you?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Sorry but they are very expensive to make. But it's your decision.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But that's more expensive than a dwarf multicannon!

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Sloppy bearded mechanics wouldn't know decent craftsmanship if it bit them on the ankle! Besides, they are far too bulky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which - the dwarf or the cannon?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Erm, are you trying to be funny?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sadly sarcasm is lost on these elves. Oh well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a shield.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you'll have to get 750,000 coins. Oh well... See you later.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you don't have space to hold it.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: They're 750,000 coins each for new ones.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Looking after yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your prices are outrageously expensive! Do I look like a banker to you?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Sorry but they are very expensive to make. But it's your decision.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But that's more expensive than a dwarf multicannon!

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Sloppy bearded mechanics wouldn't know decent craftsmanship if it bit them on the ankle! Besides, they are far too bulky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which - the dwarf or the cannon?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Erm, are you trying to be funny?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sadly sarcasm is lost on these elves. Oh well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do with crystal seeds?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Ilfeen can chant them into new items for you. She'll be wandering the forest somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep an eye out for her, thanks.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: No problem. Let us know when you are ready to be taken to Arianwyn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't want anything.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Fair enough. Let us know when you are ready to be taken to Arianwyn.
